_comment: TODO: PHP 5.6 unit-test CI matrix row.
Composer 2.2 can resolve a parallel dependency set (codeception/codeception ^4.2,
module-webdriver ^1.0) against a php 5.6 platform pin, so a downgrade pipeline for
the test harness is feasible. Blocker is the test code itself: the Cest classes,
config, and bootstrap target Codeception 5.x APIs. Running the unit suite on PHP 5.6
needs either (a) a separate composer.json + parallel test sources downgraded by Rector
or (b) backporting the Cest classes to the Codeception 4.x surface. Skipped from CI
until someone scopes that work. See .github/workflows/ (rector-idempotency.yml,
php56-lint.yml) for the gates that DO run today.
name: e107inc/e107-test
